mapper.select: /* rateMapper.getRateGrpMgmtList */ SELECT A.CD_VAL AS RATE_GRP_CD , A.CD_DSC AS RATE_GRP_NM , A.ETC1 AS SORT FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0046' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(NVL(A.ETC1, '99999'))
mapper.insert: /* rateMapper.insertRateGrpCd */ MERGE INTO CMN_GRP_CD_MST USING DUAL ON ( GRP_ID = 'CMN0046' AND CD_VAL = #{rateGrpCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CD_DSC = UPPER( #{rateGrpNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) , ETC1 = #{sort, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , RVISN_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GRP_ID , CD_VAL , CD_DSC , USG_YN , ETC1 , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM )VALUES( 'CMN0046' , UPPER( #{rateGrpCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) , UPPER( #{rateGrpNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) , 'Y' , #{sort, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE )
mapper.select: /* rateMapper.getAddSvcList */ SELECT RATE_CD, RATE_NM, BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' AND APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND RATE_CD NOT IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND USG_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY RATE_NM

/* rateMapper.getDisAddSvcList */ SELECT RATE.RATE_CD, RATE.RATE_NM, RATE.BASE_AMT, CD.USG_YN, DECODE(CD.ETC5, 'DIS', 'Y', 'N') AS DUP_YN FROM MSP_RATE_MST RATE, CMN_GRP_CD_MST CD WHERE RATE_CD = CD.CD_VAL AND CD.GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND USG_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DUP_YN DESC, RATE.RATE_NM

/* rateMapper.getAllDisAddSvcList */ SELECT RATE.RATE_CD AS rateCd, RATE.RATE_NM AS rateNm, RATE.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt, CD.USG_YN AS usgYn, DECODE(CD.ETC5, 'DIS', 'Y', 'N') AS dupYn FROM MSP_RATE_MST RATE, CMN_GRP_CD_MST CD WHERE RATE_CD = CD.CD_VAL AND CD.GRP_ID = 'RCP2042'

/* rateMapper.getDisAddSvcToVOList */ SELECT RATE.RATE_CD AS rateCd, RATE.RATE_NM AS rateNm, RATE.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt, DECODE(CD.ETC5, 'DIS', 'Y', 'N') AS dupYn FROM MSP_RATE_MST RATE, CMN_GRP_CD_MST CD WHERE RATE_CD = CD.CD_VAL AND CD.GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND USG_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* rateMapper.deleteDisAddSvc */ UPDATE CMN_GRP_CD_MST SET USG_YN = 'N', RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND CD_VAL = #{rateCd}
mapper.select: /* rateMapper.updateDisAddSvcList */ UPDATE CMN_GRP_CD_MST SET USG_YN = 'Y', ETC5 = DECODE(#{dupYn}, 'Y', 'DIS', 'N', null), RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND CD_VAL = #{rateCd}
mapper.insert: /* rateMapper.insertDisAddSvcList */ INSERT INTO CMN_GRP_CD_MST( GRP_ID, CD_VAL, CD_DSC, USG_YN, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, ETC5 )VALUES( 'RCP2042', #{rateCd}, #{rateNm}, 'Y', #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE, #{dupYn} )
mapper.select: /* rateMapper.getRateComboList */ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS VALUE , A.RATE_NM || ' ( ' || B.CD_DSC || ' )' AS TEXT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.RATE_TYPE = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0047' ORDER BY 1

/* rateMapper.getRateSpecList */ SELECT A.RATE_CD , B.RATE_NM , A.AGRM_TRM , NVL(A.TM_AMT, 0) AS TM_AMT , NVL(A.RT_AMT, 0) AS RT_AMT , NVL(A.SP_AMT, 0) AS SP_AMT , APPL_STRT_DTTM , APPL_END_DTTM FROM ( SELECT RATE_CD , AGRM_TRM , SUM(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'KD', NVL(A.DC_AMT, 0))) AS TM_AMT , SUM(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'PM', NVL(A.DC_AMT, 0))) AS RT_AMT , SUM(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'SM', NVL(A.DC_AMT, 0))) AS SP_AMT , MAX(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'PM', A.APPL_STRT_DTTM, 'SM', A.APPL_STRT_DTTM)) AS APPL_STRT_DTTM , MAX(DECODE(A.SPRT_TP, 'PM', A.APPL_END_DTTM, 'SM', A.APPL_END_DTTM)) AS APPL_END_DTTM FROM MSP_RATE_SPEC A WHERE A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND #{stdrDt} || '000000' BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DTTM AND A.APPL_END_DTTM GROUP BY A.RATE_CD, A.AGRM_TRM ) A , MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD ORDER BY A.AGRM_TRM

/* rateMapper.getRateSpecHist */ SELECT RATE_CD , SPRT_TP , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0058', SPRT_TP) AS SPRT_TP_NM , AGRM_TRM , DC_AMT , SUBSTR(APPL_STRT_DTTM,0,8) AS APPL_STRT_DTTM , SUBSTR(APPL_END_DTTM,0,8) AS APPL_END_DTTM FROM MSP_RATE_SPEC WHERE RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND AGRM_TRM = #{agrmTrm} ORDER BY SPRT_TP, APPL_STRT_DTTM DESC

/* rateMapper.getRateCancelSpecList */ SELECT RATE_CD , AGRM_TRM , MAX(DECODE(SPRT_TP,'KD', NVL(CC_AMT12, 0),0)) AS TM_AMT12 , MAX(DECODE(SPRT_TP,'KD', NVL(CC_AMT18, 0),0)) AS TM_AMT18 , MAX(DECODE(SPRT_TP,'PM', NVL(CC_AMT12, 0),0)) AS RT_AMT12 , MAX(DECODE(SPRT_TP,'PM', NVL(CC_AMT18, 0),0)) AS RT_AMT18 , MAX(DECODE(SPRT_TP,'SM', NVL(CC_AMT12, 0),0)) AS SP_AMT12 , MAX(DECODE(SPRT_TP,'SM', NVL(CC_AMT18, 0),0)) AS SP_AMT18 FROM MSP_RATE_CANCEL_SPEC WHERE RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND #{stdrDt} || '000000' BETWEEN APPL_STRT_DTTM AND APPL_END_DTTM GROUP BY RATE_CD, AGRM_TRM ORDER BY AGRM_TRM

/* rateMapper.getRateCancelSpecHist */ SELECT RATE_CD , SPRT_TP , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0058', SPRT_TP) AS SPRT_TP_NM , AGRM_TRM , CC_AMT12 , CC_AMT18 , SUBSTR(APPL_STRT_DTTM,0,8) AS APPL_STRT_DTTM , SUBSTR(APPL_END_DTTM,0,8) AS APPL_END_DTTM FROM MSP_RATE_CANCEL_SPEC WHERE RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND AGRM_TRM = #{agrmTrm} ORDER BY SPRT_TP, APPL_STRT_DTTM DESC

--> /* rateMapper.getRateMgmtRelList */ SELECT A.RATE_CD , B.ADD_SVC_CD AS ADD_SVC_CD , B.SVC_REL_TP , B.SERVICE_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0059', B.SVC_REL_TP) AS SVC_REL_TP_NM , C.RATE_NM , C.APPL_STRT_DT , C.APPL_END_DT , C.BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , MSP_PROD_REL_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND B.ADD_SVC_CD = C.RATE_CD AND C.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' ORDER BY A.APPL_STRT_DT DESC

/* rateMapper.getRateMgmtRelList */ SELECT A.RATE_CD , B.ADD_SVC_CD AS ADD_SVC_CD , B.SVC_REL_TP , B.SERVICE_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0059', B.SVC_REL_TP) AS SVC_REL_TP_NM , C.RATE_NM , C.APPL_STRT_DT , C.APPL_END_DT , C.BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , MSP_PROD_REL_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND B.ADD_SVC_CD = C.RATE_CD AND C.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' ORDER BY A.APPL_STRT_DT DESC

/* rateMapper.getRateRelListAll */ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS ADD_SVC_CD , A.RATE_NM , A.APPL_STRT_DT , A.APPL_END_DT , A.BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' AND A.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.RATE_CD != #{rateCd} ORDER BY A.RATE_NM
mapper.insert: /* rateMapper.insertRateRelHist */ INSERT INTO MSP_PROD_REL_HIST ( SEQ_NUM , RATE_CD , SERVICE_TYPE , ADD_SVC_CD , SVC_REL_TP , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT SQ_PROD_REL_TP.NEXTVAL , RATE_CD , SERVICE_TYPE , ADD_SVC_CD , SVC_REL_TP , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_PROD_REL_MST WHERE 1=1 AND RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: /* rateMapper.getAllRateList */ SELECT RATE_CD AS VALUE , RATE_NM AS TEXT FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ORDER BY RATE_NM DESC

/* rateMapper.getRateGroupList */ SELECT CD_VAL AS MST_RATE_GRP_CD , CD_DSC AS MST_RATE_GRP_NM , ETC1 AS RATE_GRP_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0063',ETC1) AS RATE_GRP_TYPE_NM , FN_GET_USRNM(RVISN_ID) AS USR_NM , TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS USR_DTTM FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0062' ORDER BY REGST_DTTM DESC
mapper.insert: /* rateMapper.insertRateGroupInfo */ INSERT INTO CMN_GRP_CD_MST ( GRP_ID , CD_VAL , CD_DSC , ETC1 , USG_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( 'CMN0062' , 'RATE'||SQ_SALE_RATE_GRP_NUM.nextVal , #{mstRateGrpNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{rateGrpTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 'Y' , #{sessionUserId} , SYSDATE , #{sessionUserId} , SYSDATE )
mapper.select: /* rateMapper.getGroupMappingRateList */ SELECT RATE_CD , (SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = MRGM.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , RATE_GRP_CD AS MST_RATE_GRP_CD , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = MRGM.RATE_GRP_CD) AS MST_RATE_GRP_NM , FN_GET_USRNM(RVISN_ID) AS USR_NM , TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS USR_DTTM FROM MSP_RATE_GROUP_MAPP MRGM WHERE RATE_GRP_CD = #{mstRateGrpCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC

/* rateMapper.getGroupRelRateList */ SELECT RATE_GRP_MST_CD AS MST_RATE_GRP_CD , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = RATE_GRP_MST_CD) AS MST_RATE_GRP_NM , RATE_GRP_SUB_CD AS SUB_RATE_GRP_CD , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = RATE_GRP_SUB_CD) AS SUB_RATE_GRP_NM , FN_GET_USRNM(RVISN_ID) AS USR_NM , TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS USR_DTTM FROM MSP_RATE_GROUP_REL ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC

/* rateMapper.getGroupByRateReList */ SELECT PRV_RATE_GRP_CD , PRV_RATE_GRP_NM , PRV_RATE_GRP_TYPE_CD , PRV_RATE_GRP_TYPE_NM , PRV_RATE_CD , PRV_RATE_NM , PRV_PTRN_RATE_YN , PRV_PAY_CL_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0013',PRV_PAY_CL_CD) AS PRV_PAY_CL_NM , PRV_DATA_TYPE , PRV_RATE_TYPE , PRV_APPL_STRT_DT , PRV_APPL_END_DT , NXT_RATE_GRP_CD , NXT_RATE_GRP_NM , NXT_RATE_GRP_TYPE_CD , NXT_RATE_GRP_TYPE_NM , NXT_RATE_CD , NXT_RATE_NM , NXT_PTRN_RATE_YN , NXT_PAY_CL_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0013',NXT_PAY_CL_CD) AS NXT_PAY_CL_NM , NXT_DATA_TYPE , NXT_RATE_TYPE , NXT_APPL_STRT_DT , NXT_APPL_END_DT FROM VW_GROUP_BY_RATE_INFO

/* rateMapper.getRateCombMappList */
SELECT A.P_RATE_CD, PRATE.RATE_NM AS P_RATE_NM, A.R_RATE_CD, RRATE.RATE_NM AS R_RATE_NM, A.APP_START_DT, A.APP_END_DT, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.REGST_ID) AS REG_NM, TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM , 'YYYYMMDD' ) AS REGST_DTTM, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_NM, TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM , 'YYYYMMDD' ) AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_COMB_RATE_MAPP A , MSP_RATE_MST PRATE , MSP_RATE_MST RRATE WHERE A.P_RATE_CD = PRATE.RATE_CD AND A.R_RATE_CD = RRATE.RATE_CD
AND #{stdrDt} BETWEEN A.APP_START_DT AND A.APP_END_DT
AND UPPER(PRATE.RATE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.P_RATE_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
AND UPPER(RRATE.RATE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.R_RATE_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
ORDER BY A.APP_START_DT DESC

/* rateMapper.getRateCombMappList */ SELECT A.P_RATE_CD as pRateCd, PRATE.RATE_NM AS pRateNm, A.R_RATE_CD as rRateCd, RRATE.RATE_NM AS rRateNm, A.APP_START_DT AS appStrDt, A.APP_END_DT AS appEndDt, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.REGST_ID) AS regNm, TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM , 'YYYYMMDD' ) AS regDt, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RVISN_ID) AS rvisnNm, TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM , 'YYYYMMDD' ) AS rvisnDt FROM MSP_COMB_RATE_MAPP A , MSP_RATE_MST PRATE , MSP_RATE_MST RRATE WHERE A.P_RATE_CD = PRATE.RATE_CD AND A.R_RATE_CD = RRATE.RATE_CD
AND #{stdrDt} BETWEEN A.APP_START_DT AND A.APP_END_DT
AND UPPER(PRATE.RATE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.P_RATE_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
AND UPPER(RRATE.RATE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.R_RATE_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
ORDER BY A.APP_START_DT DESC

/* rateMapper.getRateAcenMgmtList */
SELECT A.RATE_CD ,A.RATE_NM ,B.RATE_TYPE ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0047', B.RATE_TYPE) AS RATE_TYPE_NM ,A.BASE_VAT_AMT ,A.BASE_VAT_AMT - PRMT_VAT_AMT AS DIS_VAT_AMT ,A.PRMT_VAT_AMT ,A.CALL_CNT ,A.PRMT_CALL_CNT ,A.ETC_CALL_CNT ,A.SMS_CNT ,A.PRMT_SMS_CNT ,A.DATA_CNT ,A.PRMT_DATA_CNT ,A.DAY_DATA_CNT ,A.QOS_DATA_CNT_DESC ,A.QOS_DATA_UNIT ,A.PSTNG_START_DATE ,SUBSTR(A.PSTNG_START_DATE,9,6) AS START_TM ,A.PSTNG_END_DATE ,SUBSTR(A.PSTNG_END_DATE,9,6) AS END_TM ,A.CRET_ID ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.CRET_ID) AS CRET_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CRET_DT ,A.AMD_ID ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.AMD_ID) AS AMD_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.AMD_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS AMD_DT ,DECODE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE,(SELECT MAX(PSTNG_START_DATE) FROM NMCP_RATE_MST@DL_MCP WHERE RATE_CD = A.RATE_CD), 'Y', 'N') AS NEWEST_YN FROM NMCP_RATE_MST@DL_MCP A ,MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND #{stdrDt} BETWEEN SUBSTR(PSTNG_START_DATE, 1, 8) AND SUBSTR(PSTNG_END_DATE, 1, 8) AND A.PSTNG_START_DATE = (SELECT MAX(PSTNG_START_DATE) FROM NMCP_RATE_MST@DL_MCP WHERE RATE_CD = A.RATE_CD AND #{stdrDt} BETWEEN SUBSTR(PSTNG_START_DATE, 1, 8) AND SUBSTR(PSTNG_END_DATE, 1, 8))
AND UPPER(A.RATE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.RATE_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
ORDER BY PSTNG_START_DATE DESC

/* rateMapper.getRateAcenMgmtListExcel */ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS rateCd ,A.RATE_NM AS rateNm ,B.RATE_TYPE AS rateType ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0047', B.RATE_TYPE) AS rateTypeNm ,A.BASE_VAT_AMT AS baseVatAmt ,A.BASE_VAT_AMT - PRMT_VAT_AMT AS disVatAmt ,A.PRMT_VAT_AMT AS prmtVatAmt ,A.CALL_CNT AS callCnt ,A.PRMT_CALL_CNT AS prmtCallCnt ,A.ETC_CALL_CNT AS etcCallCnt ,A.SMS_CNT AS smsCnt ,A.PRMT_SMS_CNT AS prmtSmsCnt ,A.DATA_CNT AS dataCnt ,A.PRMT_DATA_CNT AS prmtDataCnt ,A.DAY_DATA_CNT AS dayDataCnt ,A.QOS_DATA_CNT_DESC AS qosDataCntDesc ,A.QOS_DATA_UNIT AS qosDataUnit ,A.PSTNG_START_DATE AS pstngStartDate ,A.PSTNG_END_DATE AS pstngEndDate ,A.CRET_ID AS cretId ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.CRET_ID) AS cretNm ,TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS cretDt ,A.AMD_ID AS amdId ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.AMD_ID) AS amdNm ,TO_CHAR(A.AMD_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS amdDt FROM NMCP_RATE_MST@DL_MCP A ,MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND #{stdrDt} BETWEEN SUBSTR(PSTNG_START_DATE, 1, 8) AND SUBSTR(PSTNG_END_DATE, 1, 8) AND A.PSTNG_START_DATE = (SELECT MAX(PSTNG_START_DATE) FROM NMCP_RATE_MST@DL_MCP WHERE RATE_CD = A.RATE_CD AND #{stdrDt} BETWEEN SUBSTR(PSTNG_START_DATE, 1, 8) AND SUBSTR(PSTNG_END_DATE, 1, 8))
AND UPPER(A.RATE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.RATE_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
ORDER BY PSTNG_START_DATE DESC

/* rateMapper.getRateAcenHist */
SELECT A.RATE_CD ,A.RATE_NM ,B.RATE_TYPE ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0047', B.RATE_TYPE) AS RATE_TYPE_NM ,A.BASE_VAT_AMT ,A.BASE_VAT_AMT - PRMT_VAT_AMT AS DIS_VAT_AMT ,A.PRMT_VAT_AMT ,A.CALL_CNT ,A.PRMT_CALL_CNT ,A.ETC_CALL_CNT ,A.SMS_CNT ,A.PRMT_SMS_CNT ,A.DATA_CNT ,A.PRMT_DATA_CNT ,A.DAY_DATA_CNT ,A.QOS_DATA_CNT_DESC ,A.QOS_DATA_UNIT ,A.PSTNG_START_DATE ,SUBSTR(A.PSTNG_START_DATE,9,6) AS START_TM ,A.PSTNG_END_DATE ,SUBSTR(A.PSTNG_END_DATE,9,6) AS END_TM ,A.CRET_ID ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.CRET_ID) AS CRET_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CRET_DT ,A.AMD_ID ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.AMD_ID) AS AMD_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.AMD_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS AMD_DT FROM NMCP_RATE_MST@DL_MCP A ,MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY PSTNG_START_DATE DESC

/* rateMapper.getRateAcenHistExcel */
SELECT A.RATE_CD AS rateCd ,A.RATE_NM AS rateNm ,B.RATE_TYPE AS rateType ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0047', B.RATE_TYPE) AS rateTypeNm ,A.BASE_VAT_AMT AS baseVatAmt ,A.BASE_VAT_AMT - PRMT_VAT_AMT AS disVatAmt ,A.PRMT_VAT_AMT AS prmtVatAmt ,A.CALL_CNT AS callCnt ,A.PRMT_CALL_CNT AS prmtCallCnt ,A.ETC_CALL_CNT AS etcCallCnt ,A.SMS_CNT AS smsCnt ,A.PRMT_SMS_CNT AS prmtSmsCnt ,A.DATA_CNT AS dataCnt ,A.PRMT_DATA_CNT AS prmtDataCnt ,A.DAY_DATA_CNT AS dayDataCnt ,A.QOS_DATA_CNT_DESC AS qosDataCntDesc ,A.QOS_DATA_UNIT AS qosDataUnit ,A.PSTNG_START_DATE AS pstngStartDate ,A.PSTNG_END_DATE AS pstngEndDate ,A.CRET_ID AS cretId ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.CRET_ID) AS cretNm ,TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS cretDt ,A.AMD_ID AS amdId ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.AMD_ID) AS amdNm ,TO_CHAR(A.AMD_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS amdDt FROM NMCP_RATE_MST@DL_MCP A ,MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY PSTNG_START_DATE DESC
